executives.name: Lawrie Conway
executives.background: Mr. Conway was appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director on 1 January 2023. He was previously Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer since 2014. He has more than 30 years’ experience in the resources sector across a diverse range of commercial, financial and operational activities.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director
Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Barrie Van Der Merwe
executives.background: Mr. Van Der Merwe joined Evolution as Chief Financial Officer in 2023. He has extensive experience in the resources sector, having held senior financial roles at Orica and Anglo American Platinum.

executives.name: Attie Roux
executives.background: Mr. Roux is the Chief Projects Officer. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operational management.

board_of_directors.name: Jacob (Jake) Klein
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Klein was the founding Executive Chairman of Evolution Mining. He has over 25 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of Sino Gold Mining Limited.

board_of_directors.name: James (Jim) Askew
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Askew is a mining engineer with over 40 years’ experience as a Director and Chief Executive Officer of Australian and international publicly listed mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Andrea Hall
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hall is a Chartered Accountant with over 30 years’ experience in the financial services and mining sectors. She was a partner at KPMG for 12 years.

board_of_directors.name: Jason Attew
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Attew is a mining industry executive with over 25 years of experience in investment banking and corporate strategy. He was previously CFO of Goldcorp Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith is a senior mining executive with over 40 years’ experience in the resources sector, including senior roles at Rio Tinto and Kazzinc.

board_of_directors.name: Vicky Binns
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Binns has over 35 years’ experience in the global resources and financial services sectors, including 10 years at BHP in senior executive roles.
